description: VERIFIED LIVE: 新华网 (Xinhua) via content-script DOM extraction — no login, no API key. Article links live under a date directory (/202x/…). Navigate the tab to news.cn (home or a channel) and call the tool. Tested live by Claude Code: 223 dated article links — headline + url extracted correctly. Note: the item selector keys on the /202… date path; re-probe if Xinhua changes its URL scheme.

tools.name: xinhua_headlines
tools.description: Dated article links on the current 新华网 page (home or a channel). Navigate the tab there first. Returns each story's headline and full article url. VERIFIED (223 articles).
